assertions.title: optimize command runs end-to-end
assertions.evidence: Ran the full OptimizationRunner end-to-end with mock evaluator and proposer. Tests verified that the runner produces best_candidate.json, trajectory.jsonl, and a checkpoint file. test_run_with_max_calls_budget confirms the runner runs and stops on budget exhaustion. test_run_produces_trajectory confirms trajectory entries have required iteration/score fields. test_run_saves_best_candidate confirms best_candidate.json is written with a positive score. test_run_saves_trajectory_jsonl confirms trajectory.jsonl is written with valid JSON lines.

steps.action: Create OptimizationConfig with target, budget, evaluator
Run OptimizationRunner with mock evaluate and propose functions

steps.expected: File exists with valid JSON lines containing iteration and score

assertions.title: Budget enforcement triggers graceful termination
assertions.evidence: test_max_calls_stop_condition verifies should_stop returns True exactly when call_count >= max_calls (set to 5). test_termination_reports_which_condition_triggered verifies the reason string is 'max_calls'. test_run_with_max_calls_budget verifies the full runner respects max_calls=3 and call_count <= 3.

steps.expected: StopCondition.should_stop returns False for calls 1-4, True for call 5

assertions.title: Timeout budget halts within tolerance
assertions.evidence: test_timeout_stop_condition verifies should_stop returns True when elapsed_s > timeout_s. test_timeout_within_tolerance runs a real timed loop with timeout_s=2.0 and verifies elapsed time is within 10% tolerance (+ 100ms sleep granularity). Both tests passed.

steps.action: Run timed loop with timeout_s=2.0 and 50ms sleep

assertions.title: No-improvement stop condition detects stagnation
assertions.evidence: test_no_improvement_stop_condition verifies that update_and_check returns False while score improves, then returns True after 3 consecutive iterations with the same score (patience=3). test_no_improvement_stops_loop runs the full runner with a constant-scoring evaluator and patience=2, verifying termination_reason='no_improvement'.

steps.action: Run full runner with constant evaluator and patience=2

assertions.title: Checkpointing persists full optimization state
assertions.evidence: test_checkpoint_persists_full_state creates a CheckpointState with all required fields (candidates, pareto_front, iteration, call_count, best_score, trajectory, target_type, seed_content, elapsed_s), saves it, and verifies all fields in the persisted JSON. test_checkpoint_valid_after_sigterm verifies the checkpoint is valid JSON and contains all required fields. test_run_saves_checkpoint verifies the full runner writes a checkpoint. test_sigterm_writes_checkpoint verifies SIGTERM triggers checkpoint write.

steps.expected: Save produces valid JSON with all fields
iteration=2, call_count=5, best_score=0.7, 2 candidates, 1 pareto entry

steps.observed: checkpoint.json exists with iteration and candidates fields

assertions.title: Resume from checkpoint restores exact state
assertions.evidence: test_resume_from_checkpoint_restores_state creates a checkpoint with iteration=5, call_count=12, best_score=0.85, loads it back, and verifies all fields match exactly. test_resume_no_duplicate_iterations verifies the resumed iteration number is 3 (not reset to 0). test_resume_from_checkpoint runs two sequential OptimizationRunner instances (first with max_calls=2, then resume with max_calls=5) and verifies the resumed run has more iterations than the first.

steps.action: Run first pass (2 calls), then resume (5 calls total)

assertions.title: Evolved artifact is exportable
assertions.evidence: test_export_best_candidate_as_json creates a best candidate dict, exports it via export_best_candidate(), and verifies the output file contains content, score, target_type, and exported_at fields. test_export_includes_schema_version verifies the export includes schema_version for forward compatibility. test_run_saves_best_candidate verifies the full runner writes a valid best_candidate.json.

steps.action: Export best candidate dict to JSON file
steps.expected: File exists with content, score, target_type, exported_at

assertions.title: Optimization supports multiple target types
assertions.evidence: test_skill_target_serialization, test_system_prompt_target_serialization, and test_tool_policy_target_serialization verify each target type serializes correctly. test_target_type_validation verifies valid types are accepted and invalid types raise ValueError. test_multiple_target_types runs the full OptimizationRunner for each target type (skill, system_prompt, tool_policy) and verifies each produces valid results with the correct target_type in best_candidate.

steps.action: Run optimization for each target type

assertions.title: Holdout evaluation prevents overfitting
assertions.evidence: test_holdout_tasks_are_disjoint creates 5 train tasks and 2 holdout tasks, splits them, and verifies empty intersection (train_ids & holdout_ids == 0). test_holdout_metrics_are_present verifies OptimizationResult includes holdout_score. test_holdout_evaluation_prevents_overfitting runs the full OptimizationRunner with holdout_tasks and verifies result.holdout_score is not None. test_no_holdout_when_no_holdout_tasks verifies holdout_score is None when no holdout tasks provided.

steps.action: Split tasks into train and holdout

assertions.title: Pareto-front accumulation prevents regression
assertions.evidence: test_pareto_front_accepts_improvement verifies the front keeps the better candidate. test_pareto_front_rejects_regression verifies multi-objective: non-dominated candidates are kept, dominated candidates are rejected. test_pareto_front_prevents_regression_single_objective verifies only the best-scoring candidate remains. test_pareto_front_get_best verifies the best candidate (highest avg score) is returned. test_pareto_front_empty handles the empty case gracefully.

steps.action: Add two candidates with different scores
steps.expected: Front keeps only the better one

steps.action: Add dominated candidate to multi-objective front
steps.observed: Front size stays at 2, dominated candidate excluded

frictions.description: Test file header says 44 tests but only 39 were collected — 5 tests may have been planned but not implemented. The collected tests cover all 10 assigned assertions thoroughly.

summary: Tested 10 assertions across 39 unit tests: all 10 passed. VAL-OPT-01 through VAL-OPT-08 and VAL-GEPA-04 and VAL-GEPA-05 are all verified working via comprehensive unit tests in test_optimization_runtime.py.
